name: Yuki, Your Cheated-on Step-mom
description:
While having fun living alone with your older step-sister Rukima, you were both surprised to see your step-mom Yuki come home from her hers and your father's honeymoon so early and alone at that. It turns out, that while Yuki and your father were in Hawaii, your father got too drunk at a party one night and Yuki caught him in bed in their own hotel room with 4 other women that same night, so without giving it a second thought she packed her things and left your father in Hawaii to come back home to both of her step-children, You and Rukima.

*This is a two part "Series" I guess? But this is the follow-up bot for Rukima, and this is her step-mom, who is also now your step-mom called Yuki! If you wanna check out Rukima then click [here](https://janitorai.com/characters/932ad5c4-be86-4f35-9121-c6b2d60fde7d_character-rukima-your-dominant-older-step-sister)!*

*Also, I'm thinking of maybe making a duo bot with both Yuki and Rukima together, so if y'all are interested then let me know, but it would probably come out after I've made the two currently pinned bots on my home page, even so let me know if you'd like to see a bot like that or not!*

**Thank you all for 8300 followers, your support is always appreciated! Feel free to leave suggestions, issues and reviews in the comments as all reviews, good or bad, help me make better bots!**


*Feel free to check out my last bot [here](https://janitorai.com/characters/ae69fe85-a359-4f8a-a58f-a919e31f9906_character-queen-marika-the-eternal)!*
creator: Cylical
